Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Georgia Dome, on January 8, 2005.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: World finals continues with the first day of freestyle!
Video.title: World Finals XVIII Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1

World Finals XVIII Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1
World Finals XVIII Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1

Video.summary: Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson looks for back-to-back event championships. Joe Foley attempts to drive El Toro Loco to consecutive freestyle wins and only four points separates the top three as the battle for series points lead heats up.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2013 season makes its way to Raymond James Stadium on February 2, 2013 with some racing from your favorite drivers and trucks.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: In this week’s action-packed compilation, we’re bringing you the most insane Freestyles from our latest Freestyle Mania events. The ones that earned the top scores from YOU, the fans! Featuring iconic Monster Jam trucks like JCB Digatron, Sparkle Smash, and more!
Video.title: Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation

Image.alt: Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation
Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation
Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation

Video.summary: Don't miss the start of all the racing action from the World Finals XVI at Sam Boyd Stadium on March 27, 2015.
Video.title: World Finals XVI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing - Part 1

World Finals XVI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing - Part 1

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2013 season heats up with all the racing & freestyle fun and action from Everbank Field on February 23, 2013.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2005 season continues with racing and freestyle action from the HHH Metrodome on December 4, 2004.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: The Monster Jam 2021 Stadium Championship Series continues at Atlanta Motor Speedway in Georgia.
Video.title: Atlanta Motor Speedway - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Check out the second day in Glendale, AZ during Monster Jam's 2021 season with more racing and excitement!
Video.title: State Farm Stadium - Glendale, AZ

Video.summary: Join the packed crowd at the RCA Dome in Indianapolis, IN, as your favorite trucks and drivers compete in freestyle action.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out all of the racing action from all three shows at the Gelredome, on September 26–27, 2009.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Netherlands - Racing

Video.summary: Everything is bigger in Texas and now so are the trucks! Monster Jam crashes NRG Stadium in Houston.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Check out the Monster Jam racing and freestyle action from Sun Life Stadium, on February 11, 2012.
Video.title: Sun Life Stadium - Miami, FL

Video.summary: Watch as the superstars return to Motor City for action-packed racing from Detroit, MI, on January 19, 2008.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: It's the last regular season Monster Jam in Minneapolis! Tonight, ten drivers compete with their freestyle skills.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Enjoy all the flips, tricks and spills as Monster Jam takes over Arlington, Texas.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 14 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Ford Field in Detroit, MI.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2020 season continues at TIAA Bank Field on February 29, 2020!
Video.title: TIAA Bank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Watch as the greatest Monster Jam superstars race into action at the Alamodome in San Antonio, TX, on January 12, 2008.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Two new trucks take to the dirt for the first time on this episode of Monster Jam.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing and Two-Wheel

Video.summary: See who brings home the trophy from California as the Monster Jammers compete at Levi Stadium.
Video.title: Levi Stadium - Santa Clara, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Superdome in New Orleans, LA in the 2000 season.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Video.summary: Post-tournament excitement from Arrowhead Stadium in Kansas City, MO.
Video.title: Arrowhead Stadium - Kansas City, MO

Video.summary: Watch the awesome Monster Jam racing action from your favorite trucks at Gillette Stadium on June 25, 2016.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing

Video.summary: Hold on tight while witnessing the fun at Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA during Monster Jam's 2013 season!
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: The intensity reaches a fever pitch at the Save Mart Center as Fresno hosts Round 10 of the Arena Championship Series West. Experience a masterclass in technical driving as the 2025 Arena Racer of the Year, Blake Granger, attempts a historic sweep of the night's competitions. From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying stunts of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every driver—including fan favorites like Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Armando Castro in El Toro Loco—pushes their 12,000-pound machine to the limit. Witness heart-stopping "nose wheelies," backflips, and "moonwalks" in an action-packed event that culminates in an electric Freestyle finale.
Video.title: Save Mart Center - Fresno, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam Primetime continues with even more action in Indianapolis.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Monster Jam Replay arrives at the InTrustBank Arena in Wichita, Kansas, for a pivotal Round 8 of the Arena Championship Series West. The stakes are higher than ever as the top two drivers in the series—Blake Granger and Armando Castro—face off in a high-pressure JCB Racing matchup that could shift the season leaderboard. Fans are treated to the technical brilliance of the Two Wheel Skills Challenge, featuring daring combos and gravity-defying maneuvers from the likes of Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Tim Hall Jr. in Jurassic Attack. The evening reaches a fever pitch during the Freestyle segment, where "Daredevil Diva" Angelina Nock takes Megalodon to the skies and Cliff Turner hunts for a breakthrough performance in Velociraptor. Witness the passion and raw power as these elite athletes push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute edge for the Wichita crowd.
Video.title: InTrustBank Arena - Wichita, KS
